runtime: command-scoped llama.cpp llama-server via --bonsai path with sanitized child environment
childEnvironment: sanitized allowlist; provider secrets/proxy variables not intentionally inherited

displayedFields.headline: A validation command failed repeatedly in this project.
displayedFields.whatHappened: The validation command was rerun from an old shell after the package changed.
displayedFields.whyItMatters: That can make the pass or fail result untrustworthy.
displayedFields.expectedBehavior: Run validation from a fresh project shell after reinstalling the package.
